title: Scuba Suit
body:
🧭 Scuba Suit – Mod Description


Explore the depths with ease!
This mod adds essential gear for underwater adventures — night vision goggles and a self-refilling oxygen tank.

![Scuba Goggles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e305b62f82d906eb4ebddab5373bfec6d56b449e.png)

🥽 Scuba Goggles (Helmet)

- Grants Night Vision while underwater.
- Procedural effect triggered when worn underwater.

![Oxygen Tank](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c07f20573ed4e95919b17dd239135998e3a2d749.png)

🧪 Oxygen Tank (Chestplate)

- Grants Water Breathing while underwater.
- Automatically refills itself when out of water — no extra maintenance needed!
- Procedural durability that degrades underwater and repairs on land.

🎨 What's New & Improved

✅ Redesigned 3D models for both Scuba Goggles and Oxygen Tank.

⚙️ Upgraded crafting recipes, balanced for gameplay depth.

🔄 Refill feature: Oxygen Tank automatically recharges after leaving water — seamless experience!

![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdbb2a97165c8b78799ba4b32bb8c1bb4582cfc7.png)

![Scuba Goggles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7596b987140458d0e8337d6f4ecbd1c27413b7b_0.webp) ![Oxygen Tank](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/706548e82d83b665d7e5358dfde50cf5497c6d57_0.webp)



🎯 Usage Tips

- Equipping both creates a full Scuba Suit, enabling unlimited underwater exploration without potions.
- Tank durability decreases while underwater but repairs automatically once you're on land.
- Balanced gameplay: easy crafting yet durable gear with a touch of realism.
 

Good luck 😎
